heading: Permits to cut and remove timber; citizens of Bear Lake County, Idaho
label: 611a Permits to cut and remove timber; citizens of Bear Lake County, Idaho
text: The Secretary of the Interior is authorized to grant permits, subject to the provisions of , to citizens of Bear Lake County, Idaho, to cut and remove timber on the unappropriated public domain in Lincoln County, Wyoming, for domestic use in Bear Lake County, Idaho: , That no live standing timber shall be taken without compensation.section 607 of this titleProvided
notes: CodificationSection is derived from act , which recites that it amends section 8 of act , which is the source of , by adding this section thereto. Section 8 of act , is classified to sections 607, 608 to 611a of this title.Aug. 1, 1935Mar. 31, 1891Mar. 3, 1891section 607 of this title
